description: You are a Child and Family Social Worker. You recently completed a home study evaluation for Michael and Sarah Sterling. Format the home study report located at /home/ga/Documents/raw_home_study.odt according to the agency's layout guidelines found at /home/ga/Desktop/homestudy_guidelines.txt. The document is currently open in Calligra Words. Apply all required formatting rules from the guidelines and save the document.

quote_samples: We always knew we wanted to adopt
My childhood was filled with outdoor activities
Our parenting philosophy is based on mutual respect
